title: forsteronia rufa
intro: Forsteronia rufa is a plant species that belongs to the family Menispermaceae, commonly known as the moonseed family. Traditionally, it is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The plant is rich in alkaloids, which are believed to have analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic effects, providing health benefits such as pain relief, reduced inflammation, and fever reduction. In herbal preparations, Forsteronia rufa is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in some traditional remedies to treat various health conditions.
